description: Migration and First-Run Experience: Auto-migration and backward compatibility

log.action: Moved to triage for re-specification — new dependency added

log.outcome: This is a well-structured, comprehensive specification for the migration and first-run experience. The spec correctly identifies the critical need for backward compatibility and smooth transitions from single-project to multi-project mode. The mission is clear, steps have concrete outcomes, and testing requirements are rigorous. Minor issues exist around file naming conventions and a few dependency assumptions.
